rationale: For a real-time chess app, clarity and focus are paramount. A Swiss-inspired minimalist light theme reduces cognitive load, keeps attention entirely on the board, and ensures high contrast for move readability and chat integration.

headings.usage: Use for primary page titles, room ID headers, and modal titles. Must use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.

body.usage: Use for chat messages, usernames, button labels, and general UI. Keeps an objective, technical tone.

mono.usage: CRITICAL: Use for chess move notation (e.g., e4, Nf3), timers, and Room URL links. Adds a structural/data feel.

layout.overall_structure: Fullscreen split-screen layout (h-screen w-full overflow-hidden). Mobile: stacked (grid-cols-1 overflow-y-auto). Desktop: CSS Grid with lg:grid-cols-12.
layout.left_panel_board: Takes col-span-8. Flex center, minimal padding. The chessboard MUST be strictly responsive, locked to an aspect-square ratio. Maximum height should be 85vh to prevent vertical scrolling.
layout.right_panel_sidebar: Takes col-span-4. Cardless bento structure. Must have a strict left border (1px solid border-border) to separate it from the board. Houses Tabs (Move History vs. Chat).
layout.chat_area: Sticky bottom input layout. The message feed must be a ScrollArea that auto-scrolls. Own messages align right (bg-surface), opponent/spectator messages align left (bg-white border).
layout.spacing: Use generous internal padding for containers (p-6, p-8) but dense, tight spacing for data like move history (gap-2).

components.buttons: Avoid pill shapes. Use sharp edges (rounded-none) or subtle radius (rounded-sm). Active state must have high contrast (hover:bg-black/90 hover:text-white).
components.inputs: Flat Shadcn inputs with strong focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black focus:border-black). No soft shadows.
components.modals: Dialog for Username/Room Prompt must use Glassmorphism (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/40). Give it a premium 'Crystal' Apple variant look over the board.
components.tabs: Override standard Shadcn tabs. Use clear underline indicators for active state rather than pill backgrounds. h-auto, not fixed height.

images.description: High-contrast minimalist chess piece photograph. Use for landing page hero background or empty states before game start.
Abstract white geometric background. Use as a subtle backdrop for the username selection modal or full-screen loading state.

motion.microinteractions: Snappy, precise transitions. transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.
motion.alerts: When player is in 'Check', the board border or status indicator should pulse in Signal Red (#FF3B30).
motion.pieces: Drag and drop should feel weightless. Ensure smooth frame rates.

testing.attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid`. Examples: `data-testid='chat-input'`, `data-testid='send-message-button'`, `data-testid='reset-game-button'`.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize Tailwind config to replace default Sans font with 'IBM Plex Sans' and Serif/Heading with 'Cabinet Grotesk'.
Implement real-time chessboard using standard robust libraries (e.g., react-chessboard) mapped to our color variables.
Ensure UI is fully responsive. Board goes on top, chat on bottom for mobile views.
Highlight game statuses (turn, check, mate) prominently above the board or in the sidebar header.
Do NOT wrap this JSON in markdown when reading. It is a strict JSON object.
